caption: A screen recording displays a Google Sheets spreadsheet titled "TH 5/3 - 2021 TOPPS TRANSCENDENCE COLLECTION HALL OF FAME EDITION BASEBA...". The document contains lists of names and card descriptions, such as "Jason FraccaromoHOLIDAYs," "Will Driggers," and "(1) ROD Carew 1958-1989 Topps Big Framed Autograph 1 of 1-o-1." At the bottom of the browser window, a red promotional banner reads "Hit the Subscribe button down below!" next to a "Subscribe" button. As the recording progresses, the view shifts across the spreadsheet. The cursor moves from the left side of the document to the right, scrolling through different columns of text. The content changes from names like "Riley" and "Robert" to lists featuring "Paul Jon McNelly," "Ricky Henderson 1/1," and "EDGAR MARTINEZ 4/22." The user continues to navigate through various rows of data throughout the sequence.
